content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed branch feat/9ni-5-7-harden-create-from-bead against origin/master (fork point 808707ce) for bead 9ni.5.7. The implementation correctly hardens `project create-from-bead` / `task create` against duplicate active-bead creation: (1) new `AppError::DuplicateActiveBead` and `AppError::DuplicateBeadProject` variants with actionable remediation text; (2) `execute_create_from_bead` acquires the task_runs_lock after load_snapshot_clearing_pending_lineage_reset (correct lock ordering milestone_write_lock → task_runs_lock, no reversal) then runs `reject_duplicate_active_bead_creation` and `reject_existing_same_bead_project_creation` before any filesystem mutation; (3) same-bead matching uses task_source with an explicit legacy default-id fallback guarded by `SameBeadProjectMatchMode`; (4) NotStarted matching projects route to `DuplicateBeadProject` pointing at `project select` + `run start`, Failed/Paused route to `RunStartFailed` pointing at `run resume`, Running-without-lineage produces a repair hint, Completed is allowed through (yielding DuplicateProject only on id collision); (5) `record_task_run_start` gains a pre-repair cross-project active-bead check so legacy runless conflicts surface as repair guidance instead of being silently rewritten by `fail_legacy_runless_entries`; (6) the different-bead run-start guard is preserved; (7) `recover_existing_bead_project_after_create_conflict` lets `ensure_project_for_controller` adopt the existing project on duplicate conflicts via `is_create_from_bead_duplicate_conflict`. Acceptance criteria (stable CLI error text, retry-via-run-resume for failed/paused, repair hints for orphaned/legacy/corrupt lineage, deterministic tests) are met. Targeted cargo tests (48 project_create_from_bead unit tests + 3 cli integration tests covering prefers_failed_retry_over_completed_default, allows_creation_with_multiple_terminal_same_bead_projects, ignores_manual_default_named_project_without_task_source) pass, as do `cargo fmt --check` and `cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings`. No correctness, safety, or robustness issues found within bead scope; no amendments proposed.

## Amendments

None.
